_evidenceStatus: EXPECTED — Scenario D. Harness-verified (cyclesInMonthFromAnchor + computeStatutoryContributions). Jan 2057 has THREE biweekly cycles starting in-month (01, 15, 29) → SSS monthly cap split across 3, last cycle absorbs remainder. NO over-deduction.
_verified: Month totals equal the monthly cap (1,750 / 3,500) — identical to monthly and semi-monthly. The old periodsPerMonth=2 approximation would have under-counted cycles in this 3-cycle month; the anchor-based actual count fixes it.
